ibm.csm.ibm_csm_active_standby_action.short_description: Allows customers to set the server as a standby, issue a takeover, or remove the associated server
ibm.csm.ibm_csm_active_standby_action.description: Returns the result of the requested action against a CSM server

ibm.csm.ibm_csm_copyset_manage.short_description: Allows customers to create or delete copy sets on CSM sessions
ibm.csm.ibm_csm_copyset_manage.description: Returns the result of the command for the session specified

ibm.csm.ibm_csm_info.short_description: Retrieves current environment information from CSM server
ibm.csm.ibm_csm_info.description: Returns a list of specified CSM Server object(s) including Sessions, Task Schedules, Copysets, Hardware, CSM System and Authorization.

ibm.csm.ibm_csm_run_any_rest_call.short_description: Allows customers to run, CSM REST call that may not be supported by other modules.
ibm.csm.ibm_csm_run_any_rest_call.description: Returns the result of the requested action against a CSM REST task.

ibm.csm.ibm_csm_scheduled_task_action.short_description: Allows customers to run, enable or disable a CSM scheduled task
ibm.csm.ibm_csm_scheduled_task_action.description: Returns the result of the requested action against a CSM scheduled task.

ibm.csm.ibm_csm_session_action.short_description: Allows customers to issue commands to sessions on the CSM server
ibm.csm.ibm_csm_session_action.description: Returns the result of the requested action against a CSM server

ibm.csm.ibm_csm_session_manage.short_description: Allows customers to create, delete or modify CSM sessions
ibm.csm.ibm_csm_session_manage.description: Returns the result of the command for the session specified
